user.title: Connect to GenieACS
user.description: Enter the NBI (Northbound Interface) URL and optional credentials for your GenieACS instance.

data_description.nbi_url: The URL of the GenieACS NBI API (e.g. http://genieacs:7557).
data_description.username: HTTP Basic auth username (leave empty if auth is disabled).

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the GenieACS NBI. Verify the URL is correct and the service is running.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check the username and password.

abort.already_configured: This GenieACS instance is already configured.
